Tenant isolation: Row-Level Security on tenant_id (pooled) or DB/schema-per-tenant (silo).

Automated snapshots + AWS Backup; part of Aurora Global Database.

• Identical stack via ArgoCD / GitOps
• Managed node groups (multi-AZ)

agents and per-tenant namespaces
• VPC PrivateLink endpoints
Receives the new release first;
promoted to active on Route 53 cutover.
